issue.message: Field requires API level 33 (current min is 24): `android.Manifest.permission#POST_NOTIFICATIONS`
Field requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.provider.DocumentsContract#EXTRA_INITIAL_URI`
Field requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.provider.DocumentsContract#EXTRA_INITIAL_URI`
Field requires API level 26 (current min is 24): `android.provider.DocumentsContract#EXTRA_INITIAL_URI`
The locale folder "`he`" should be called "`iw`" instead; see the `java.util.Locale` documentation
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
The lambda argument (`{ it <= ' ' }`) is unnecessary
The lambda argument (`{ it <= ' ' }`) is unnecessary
The lambda argument (`{ it <= ' ' }`) is unnecessary
The lambda argument (`{ it <= ' ' }`) is unnecessary
The lambda argument (`{ it <= ' ' }`) is unnecessary
Method compress must be called from the worker thread, currently inferred thread is UI thread
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration
At least one `host` must be specified
At least one `host` must be specified
At least one `host` must be specified
Consider splitting data tag into multiple tags with individual attributes to avoid confusion
Consider splitting data tag into multiple tags with individual attributes to avoid confusion
An activity in this app supports picture-in-picture and the targetSdkVersion is 31 or above; it is therefore strongly recommended to call both `setAutoEnterEnabled(true)` and `setSourceRectHint(...)`
Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Optional Modifier parameter should have a default value of `Modifier`
Content padding parameter _ is not used
Content padding parameter _ is not used

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).
"imagenes" is a common misspelling; did you mean "imágenes"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="setting_summary_javascript">Habilitar JavaScript. Muchos sitios web necesitan JavaScript para su funcionalidad (menús, carga e imagenes y más) pero también puede usarse para ataques</string>

issue.message: "kağıt" is a common misspelling; did you mean "kâğıt"?
Repeated word "karakter" in message: possible typo
issue.errorLine1: <string name="setting_summary_chat_stream">Yanıt karakter karakter gösterilir, böylece daha hızlı olur</string>
android.util.Log.e("BrowserToolsImpl", "Failed to parse links JSON: $raw", e)
Log.w("browser", "Missing blob download session for chunk: $downloadId")
Log.w("browser", "Missing blob download session on completion: $downloadId")
Log.w("browser", "Activity gone before blob download completion: $downloadId")
Log.w("browser", "DownloadManager failed, falling back to direct download: $e")
Log.e("EpubReaderView", "Failed to save TOC changes", e)
Log.e(TAG, "Bad request - invalid URL or parameters")
Log.e(TAG, "Error adding URL to Instapaper", e)
Log.w("JsWebInterface", "Ignoring blob download chunk with invalid id")
Log.w("JsWebInterface", "Ignoring blob download completion with invalid id")
Log.w("JsWebInterface", "Ignoring blob download error with invalid id")

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("override"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("overrides"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Missing x86_64 ABI support for ChromeOS
Using `setJavaScriptEnabled` can introduce XSS vulnerabilities into your application, review carefully

The attribute `android:fullBackupContent` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.
This `OutputStream` should be freed up after use with `#close()`
Very long vector path (7894 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (4516 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (3474 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Assigning `value` will cause an autoboxing operation. Use `intValue` to avoid unnecessary allocations.
Assigning `value` will cause an autoboxing operation. Use `intValue` to avoid unnecessary allocations.
Assigning `value` will cause an autoboxing operation. Use `intValue` to avoid unnecessary allocations.
Assigning `value` will cause an autoboxing operation. Use `intValue` to avoid unnecessary allocations.

Assigning `value` will cause an autoboxing operation. Use `intValue` to avoid unnecessary allocations.
